clean_text: Please dear brothers move forward and please if you come in the another juma direct sit down in the front of the head jazakum allah and also we have the two rooms here in cornell you can go to to there just dear brothers and sisters allah subhanahu wa'ta'ala says in the quran there is nothing that you have except that it is a blessing from allah allah also subhanahu wa allah says in the quran if you try to count the bounties of allah you would not be able muslims know that among allah's blessings is that he gave you the gift of islam allah has blessed you with this while he has made it a trial for some others because he wants to separate those who are good from those who are evil allah says in the quran allah owns everything that is in the heavens and the earth he creates what he wills and he grant some people female child children while he grant other male children after the blessing of islam one of the greatest blessings that allah granted the human beings in a child is a child especially righteous children no one knows the true blessings of having a child except those who are deprived of this there have been many people who have not been able to became mothers or fathers you see them striving day and night to have a child we must remember though that the power of allah is above the ability of any doctor or worldly procedures he tests his creation and he also blesses his creation so his creation should then be patient and call on another to patients and they should enjoy good amongst one another so that they may be successful and children are the declaration of worldly life so children are a pleasure for us in this life the prophet be muhammed him said truly your children have right over you so we must be careful about how we raise our children we may we must treat them with love respect and kindness and should not oppress them if children are raised in their wrong way we cannot expect them to be yours applied and we must always remember that allah is watching us there are some parents who could not raise their children properly they neglected them and their children became disrespectful and maybe even were laid to trade this is an issue that we see in our everyday lives these youth have reached the age of young adulthood but their behavior is still childish they do more bad things than goods may allah grant him mercy said whoever neglects raising a needle teaching and raising his children correctly has certainly certainly done his children disservice when parents neglect to teach the obligations of islam and the traditions of the messengers children became lost they do not benefit in themselves nor their parents we need to ask how can a father and a mother be at peace while their children are outside the house doing all kinds of bad things it is is this the proper way to raise children don't the parents need to learn proper behavior towards their children the answer is yes if the parents not the prayer those children follow who maybe we'll follow that people in the school and the university allah says in the quran and who is more in just and just than one who is reminded of verses of his lord but turns away from them and forgets what his hands have put forth indeed we have played over their hearts governance then they understand it and in there is deafness and if you invite them to guidance they will never be guided then ever so it is it instantly clear that children must be taking care of their youth they must be raised in a proper manner so that they can become righteous members of their communities and society so fear allah when it comes to your children take care in doing what allah commanded you by raising them in a proper manner and remember the day of judgment that we will all have to face allah says in the quran stop them because they will be questioned dear brothers and sisters i call on you to bring your children to masjid so that their hearts become attached to it you must have them participate in the programs that we have set up for them so so that they can be true colors to islam they will learn to understand their religion and become men and women of piety they will be able to serve the religion of allah just the children of their companions may allah be pleased with them this will be source of ongoing charity for upon him said if a human being dies all actions all actions are cut off except three an ongoing chargeable deed knowledge that benefited others or arachio's child who pray who prays for the deceased or our lord give us righteous spouses and righteous of supreme that will be a pleasure for our eyes i seek i seek allah's forgiveness for myself for you our children for our parents and all the muslims of islam happiness is.

summary: This lecture addresses the importance of raising children properly in Islam, emphasizing that children are among Allah's greatest blessings. The speaker discusses how parents have a significant responsibility to raise their children with love, respect, and kindness while teaching them Islamic obligations and proper behavior. The lecture warns against parental neglect, which leads to children becoming disrespectful and engaging in harmful behaviors, and stresses that parents will be questioned about their duties on the Day of Judgment.
suggested_title: The Islamic Responsibility of Raising Righteous Children
hadith_chapter: Chapter on Rights of Children and Parental Duties
catchy_title: Why Allah Questions Parents About Their Children
